1027.heroDescription: Experience compassionate, world-class medical care with our team of experienced physicians and state-of-the-art facilities. We are dedicated to your well-being and recovery.
1027.aboutDescription: Founded in 1998, Vitality Medical Centre has grown from a small family practice into one of India's most trusted multi-speciality healthcare providers. Our commitment to excellence and patient-centered care has earned us the loyalty of over 50,000 patients.
1027.missionStatement: To provide accessible, high-quality healthcare that treats every patient with dignity, compassion, and the most advanced medical expertise available.

services.title: General Consultation
services.description: Comprehensive health assessments, diagnosis, and treatment plans for common illnesses and chronic conditions by our experienced physicians.

services.title: Dental Care
services.description: Complete dental services including cleanings, fillings, extractions, cosmetic dentistry, and orthodontic consultations for all ages.

services.title: Physiotherapy
services.description: Expert rehabilitation services for sports injuries, post-surgical recovery, chronic pain management, and mobility improvement.

services.title: Cardiology
services.description: Advanced cardiac screenings, ECG, stress tests, and heart health management by our board-certified cardiologists.

services.title: Pediatrics
services.description: Specialized care for infants, children, and adolescents including vaccinations, growth monitoring, and developmental assessments.

services.title: Diagnostic Lab
services.description: State-of-the-art laboratory services with rapid turnaround times for blood tests, imaging, pathology, and health screenings.

seo.metaDescription: Vitality Medical Centre - Trusted multi-speciality healthcare in India with experienced doctors, modern facilities, and compassionate care. Book your appointment today.
seo.metaKeywords: doctor clinic India, medical centre, healthcare, general consultation, dental care, physiotherapy, appointment booking, multi-speciality clinic

2048.heroDescription: LifeCare Hospital brings world-class medical expertise to your neighbourhood. From routine check-ups to complex procedures, we are with you every step of the way.
2048.aboutDescription: Established in 2005 in the heart of Mumbai, LifeCare Hospital has become a beacon of modern healthcare with a team of over 22 specialists across multiple departments. We blend cutting-edge technology with a warm, human touch.
2048.missionStatement: To deliver evidence-based, patient-first healthcare that empowers individuals and strengthens communities.

doctors.name: Dr. Suresh Patel
doctors.title: Medical Director
doctors.qualification: MS, Seth GS Medical College Mumbai

services.title: General Surgery
services.description: Minimally invasive and open surgical procedures for a wide range of conditions, performed by our experienced surgical team.

services.title: Gynaecology & Obstetrics
services.description: Complete women's health services from prenatal care and normal delivery to complex gynaecological procedures.

services.title: Neurology
services.description: Diagnosis and treatment of neurological disorders including stroke, epilepsy, migraines, and Parkinson's disease.

services.title: Orthopaedics
services.description: Expert care for bone, joint, and muscle conditions including joint replacements, fractures, and sports injuries.

services.title: Ophthalmology
services.description: Comprehensive eye care including cataract surgery, LASIK, glaucoma management, and pediatric eye services.

services.title: Pathology Lab
services.description: NABL-accredited diagnostic laboratory offering a full range of tests with same-day reports for most investigations.

seo.metaDescription: LifeCare Hospital Mumbai - Advanced multi-speciality hospital in Bandra West with expert doctors and 24/7 emergency care. Book your appointment today.
seo.metaKeywords: hospital Mumbai, Bandra hospital, gynaecology, neurology, orthopaedics, surgery, diagnostics, healthcare Mumbai

3091.heroDescription: WellSpring Clinic offers holistic, patient-centred primary care and specialist services in a calm, welcoming environment. Because good health is the foundation of everything.
3091.aboutDescription: WellSpring Clinic was founded in 2012 in Bengaluru with a simple idea: healthcare should feel human. Our small but highly skilled team of specialists provides the kind of personalised attention that larger hospitals often can't offer.
3091.missionStatement: To make exceptional primary and specialist care accessible, affordable, and genuinely compassionate for every patient who walks through our doors.

services.title: Family Medicine
services.description: Comprehensive primary care for all ages — from newborns to seniors — with continuity of care and long-term health management.

services.title: Dermatology & Cosmetology
services.description: Skin, hair, and nail treatments including acne management, chemical peels, laser therapy, and anti-ageing procedures.

services.title: Lifestyle & Nutrition
services.description: Personalised nutrition counselling, weight management programmes, and lifestyle modification plans led by certified experts.

services.title: Mental Wellness
services.description: Confidential counselling, stress management, anxiety and depression support in a safe, judgement-free space.

services.title: Preventive Health
services.description: Annual health screenings, vaccination programmes, and early-detection packages tailored to your age and risk profile.

services.title: In-Clinic Lab
services.description: Quick, reliable diagnostic tests with same-day results for routine blood work, urinalysis, and health checkups.

seo.metaDescription: WellSpring Clinic Bengaluru — Holistic family medicine, dermatology, mental wellness, and preventive care in Koramangala. Book your appointment today.
seo.metaKeywords: clinic Bengaluru, Koramangala doctor, family medicine, dermatology, mental wellness, preventive healthcare Bangalore
